Abridged Project Text: Emergence is an other-worldly luminous sculpture experience that mysteriously started surfacing at Bombay Beach. The sculptures appear to be intelligent, organic and mechanical in form with spinal columns and finger-like limbs embracing crystal cubes. Not all have surfaced...Will more appear?

The Philosophical Computer is a philosophical sculpture entirely permutable that is made of 54 symbols of the great philosophical revolutions of the western world from the totemic God to Post-modernity. The goal is to articulate these symbols together to create new contemporary cultural synthesis.
Explore the secret of the palms and bathe in their light

Water Lilies is a floating mosaic sculpture, round colorful mirrors intertwined with the sea reflecting the light and environment around. the mosaic floats upon the waves creating a mirage like sensation changing with light and movement.

Project Name: A Gentle Place Before the End
Additional Artists: Jason Asbahr, Sarah Dopp, Corinna Kester
Abridged Project Text: Somewhere between ruin and rebirth, there is a room to sit quietly. Carpets soften the desert; patterned lantern light drifts while a gentle soundscape carries whispered poetry. No performance, no verdict. Stay awhile, leave a trace in the Book of the Known, then return to dust and judgement.
Immerse yourself in color, light, and movement

Additional Artists: Quirky Corky, Val Rotar, Peter Djordjevich
Abridged Project Text: Tired of wandering through life? Pause and arrive at Westlandia Desert Oasis, where weary feet and restless minds find renewal. Heal in our vibroacoustic dome, sip a last-call drink in the lounge, and leave your mark by gifting found objects to our vibrant peddlers’ paradise.
Reimagined Western Paintings by Jake Wade / Salton Sea Time Capsule Photographs by Sandi Wheaton

These collages remind one of a third grade bulletin board...on peyote. Formed in a blacked out tangent, the paint was applied by gravity and shaped by the subtle magnetic forces in the earth. Pigeons and magnets appear and reappear. They too respond to the earths magnetic fields

Project Name: The Jazz Club at the DORD , sponsored by YARGER PROJECTS
Artist Name: TIM YARGER / Tyler Hammond Jazz Experience
Abridged Project Text: The Jazz Club at the DORD has added another remarkable musical experience to BBB , paralleling the The Opera, The Ballet  at the DJ sets ...

While It Last 
Everything stands for a while.

Project Name: THE VOICE THAT SURVIVED THE SUN
Abridged Project Text: THE VOICE THAT SURVIVED THE SUN is a solo ritual by Thee Suburbia using voice, screamo, flexible acrylic mirrors, a fog vest, and one breakable rubber glass object. The work moves through burning and collapse into a self driven resurrection and a final ceremonial breaking of internal judgment.
A paper maché child's sweater covered in pale blue glitter like the sky suspended from a clothing line, an homage to the extraordinary in the ordinary.

San Litio - 1905 - 1999

The divine saint of the Salton Sea, creator of lithium and protector of debris. 

Provides: youthful energy, calm reflections, and clean water.

okay you, you're ok

Come breathe, stretch, and start your day with one of the oldest calm technologies: gentle yoga and ambient music designed to develop interoceptive awareness and genuine presence. No experience necessary. Bring a mat if you have one.
You are invited to experience the performance of love to Mamacita Junior the third, my tiny little minivan, which is my ever evolving home for the last 9 years.

Project Name: The Salton Sea Museum and Library
Abridged Project Text:
Reopening at BBAC the Salton Sea Museum and Library has added new ephemera and titles representing the Salton Sea history and ecology. 
Additionally titles include topics covering Western Water, Deserts and Landscape studies.
Location (Internal): BBAC Center Bombay Beach Arts & Culture Center

Abridged Project Text: Ghost Cadillac is a loving and meticulously rendered full scale sculptural line drawing of a 1972 Cadillac El Dorado.  The 'wire frame' sculpture has no paneling,  so that the effect is like a skeleton leaf,  a transparent and ghostly embodiment of this classic American automobile.

Yellow ribbons are suspended from a horizontal bar  for the wind to play. There is a marker to write wishes for the wind to take. The frame is 9 feet tall with the ribbons taking the space in the middle exposing the top part to the sky to watch while sitting on a provided chair.

The Tiny Closet On Wheels is a pop-up gay bar art car out of a pop-up truck camper. Cabincore maximilist "man-cave" aesthetics on the inside, and rainbow LEDs on the outside supporting an inclusive vibe and
Curl is a new flame effect piece inspired by the math and physics of electromagnetism. Twelve jets of pulsing fire on a beautiful twisting helix of copper and steel.

Project Name: HENDERSON HALL.  MZ Aqua Community Enrichment ProjectS *MACEPS
Additional Artists: Sharonda Clark, Mark Linck, Arabella Serrell
Abridged Project Text: Henderson Hall is a new community space open to a wide variety of programing . Conceived of by MZ AQUA as her final legacy piece to elevate and support the community of Bombay Beach by providing a large open space with infinite possibilities .
Please download this app at (this address) to see everything going on with the Bienalle and manage your artist presence independently.

Additional Artists: Extension of GCEPS. guerilla community enrichment projects
Abridged Project Text: A space you can walk through to engage with large sculptures
A flag, an ode to impermanence

Calling to the waters that connect all life, Akasha is a symbol of hope and continuity – things slip through the cracks, life finds a way and through this unusual genesis new ideas are born. Where there is water there is life. At the shore of a dying sea, what can be done?

The Poetry House is a center for poetry and spiritual restoration, celebrating poetry as a technology that translates emotions into tangible reality. Co-created by Pharaoh and Tao Ruspoli, participants are welcome to write their favorite verses on the walls...
Tarot Readings at The Poetry House with Pharaoh! Readings are approximately ten minutes. Pay-what-you-can, offerings are also welcome!

The Poetry Salon is where the poets of Bombay Beach gather and offer the poems that have touched their hearts. Done entirely in silence, poetry springs forth from the most unexpected places. Bring a poem you know, or a poem you wrote.

Have an old school italian festival with music food and drink (aperitivo) during sunset and then screen from Rome Italy, Anna Negri's, Venice Film Festival selected, feature Documentary. Toni mio Padre afterwards with Q&A

"The Toll" is a sound sculpture made from a recycled industrial propane tank. A heavy piece of industrial waste, transformed into a stationary bell designed to ring out the voices of those who were silenced for their activism.

In Celebration of the BBB’s tenth year Anniversary we will be curating a group show at The Foundation that will feature local, visiting and distant artists with works within the disciplines of 2D, 3D/Sculpture, assemblage and installation.

A contemporary reimagining of idealized beauty, this piece contrasts classical art with today’s selfie culture. Inspired by Bertel Thorvaldsen’s Eve Holding an Apple, the marble replica replaces the apple with a smartphone, questioning whether modern self-image reflects vanity or addiction.

Roll the dice, see what stage of moral development you've reached, and win a cocktail, mocktail, or a surprise! This will be a pre-party for the fashion show at Bliss Beach Club (happening around sunset).

Broken porcelain pavers form a low field: one side smooth, one side shards, with a few tiles painted as “repairs.” A black dog-shaped stone appears to lift off and leave. The work treats judgement as a sorting system—intact/broken, clean/ruined—and suggests the simplest verdict is to exit the scene.
A memory of a sailboat fading with the memory of the resort.
Bombay Bliss Beach Club

Additional Artists: Darryl Curry, Suzanne Curry, Lacey Curry
Abridged Project Text: The night before was kind of rough, got up around 10:00, started running around looking at art had a taco at 11:00, starting to burn out and getting tired, as I raise my head the sun burning my eyes I see a line, it's affogatos

Empathy Bleed traces two contrasting bodies of water – California’s receding Salton Sea/ancient Lake Cahuilla and the biodiverse Western Port/Wurnmarrinh in Australia – exploring the charged space in between, empathy and breath. An artist edition of the book, and a live reading with be offered.
Location (Internal): Bombay Beach Museum of Bombay Beach

Project Name: Everything I Desire Is Already Mine
Abridged Project Text: A 10-minute video piece featuring mud pots and manifestation, looped.

Aperion calls us into communion with the wild, unbounded intelligence of the beyond-human world; featuring a night-black dish holding salt water, with wings of glistening charcoal sourced from scorched local wetlands, drawing upon chimerism, transmutation & alchemy to speak to the beyond-human world

built of art like legos on 4'x6' panels, the installation is composed of 250 paintings digitized onto coreplast. this habitrail of my imagination is a construction of the places people and art i love so much I had to paint a picture of them and build them a cappella.

Echoes of a Dying Sea is a steel fish. Shout into its mouth and your voice travels to an underwater speaker in the Salton Sea, then returns through a hydrophone: transformed by salt and distance into smear, echo, and reverb.

Project Name: Mella Tarantella--Risorga e Balla con i Morti e Vivi alla Fine Dei Giorni
Abridged Project Text: Dance for the End of Days

Project Name: The Last Catch (what remains as everything drains away)
Abridged Project Text: A 5-foot mirror-mosaic fish skeleton hangs from a hook at the Salton Sea. Part relic, part disco ball, part skeletal poem. A collaboration between fancyVANDALS and Spenser Little, it’s a monument to what still glitters when everything else drains away.

A meditation on the nature of mass consumerism and global capitalism, and the devastating impact it has on our built and non-built environments, as well as the exploitation of disposable human capital.

A two-panel acrylic diptych born from a real encounter at a “protected” beach turned toxic. One panel conjures a wrecked afterlife of debris, beauty, and bodily threat; the other imagines an inner refuge that won’t fully seal. Folk wards ring the edges. Small mercies flicker inside.

What is that thing? 
Let's check it out. 
A polished steel form, crawling up from the sands of the beach, a cave for you to enter. 
Within, you see buttons! And pipes and hoses buried inside a writhing snake-like structure. 
What is this thing?
Press button. Fire erupts. Music happens.
:-D

Project Name: Liminal Vessel: Omphalos, Marker of a Dead Sea
Abridged Project Text: At the Salton Sea, Liminal Vessel: Omphalos, Marker of a Dead Sea rises as a witness to a slow collapse. Clay, light and void form a ceremonial object for a post - hope landscape - where judgement lingers, water withdraws, and the sublime persists amid decay.
Capture a photo with your sins, the only payment required is your confession.

In my surrealist conceptual offering I'm bringing magic and symbolism to the Salton Sea by inviting Artemis, the lady of the lake, to visit her home away from home, a hollow Redwood tree temple in a trailer, thus shifting shapes and playing with perception.

A structure rises from the water in tiers, built from steel armatures pierced with rawhide. The hide is gathered, stretched, and trailing, shifting from pliable to rigid as it dries from the sea, shrinking to tension the frame and mark receding water levels.

A ceremonial burning of a 7.5-foot driftwood figure animated by hyperrealist projections. Guests feed written judgments into the open frame. As the sculpture burns, a clay heart—fired by the heat—emerges from the ash, a permanent artifact of community persistence amidst infrastructure collapse.

Additional Artists: Sophi Kravitz, Sofy Yuditskaya, Ria Rajan, Oliver Tanner
Abridged Project Text: Liz is 126 years old and choosing the date of her death. She has uploaded her memories to the near-far future archive: the Fire-Flood Years, five marriages, bioengineered hearts, the moment humanity chose to stay connected. Cosmic rays from outer space activate her voice. She left this for you.

This is the Last Supper before it goes up in flames. A dining table and chairs to gather around before it becomes the bonfire on which we cook our meal. Sit down, eat and enjoy, before the set itself is consumed.

Additional Artists: Mars College's Tool Camp and Co-Lab Communitues
Abridged Project Text: Welcome to The SCAR Wash, a full-service detachment from the judgements we carry in the weight of our emotions. Here, you leave the opinions of others to be dissolved into the remnants of a dissolving sea. You may have arrived in a mistaken identity, yet in no way are you a mistake in motion.
Bombay Beach Surf Club Sunset Sessions                                                                                       Come paddle out on the Salton Sea Surfboards provided

Project Name: The Thread of Life | Act III: Own your Fate
Abridged Project Text: “The Thread of Life | Act III: Own Your Fate” is an immersive ritual-performance where myth, ancestry, and craft colide. Guided by Nyx and the Moirai, participants are invited to own their fate and weave it into the Loom of Life.

The NUMEN project situates painted and draped figures within desert and geological landscapes, examining how the sacred is constructed and projected onto flesh and earth. As fabrics, paints, and pigments intervene upon the body, the body itself becomes an intervention within the landscape.
ECOTECHNO 4DXYZ is an immersive screening encounter that engages all seven senses to take stock of our long-negotiated relationship with and between nature and technology.

What would it take for you to leave your comfortable life? Join Amy Brown Carver for 45-minutes of stand-up and collective comedy adventure about one woman’s search for freedom, meaning, and the closest flush toilet.
Hussein, Antimony. My Niland II (Westward Journey). 2026. Video projection, multi-channel, buttermilk, car windshield, rear-view mirror. duration tbd, likely 24 hours.

God Is / Sustenance centers the body and land as sacred sites. A living altar invites offering and reflection on embodied divinity, while immersive stations throughout the landscape guide participants into contemplation, reverence, and renewed relationship with the environment.

Project Name: Sun Shine Dreams: Legends of Bomabay Beach, Unconditional Love and Stuff
Abridged Project Text: An excursion through the essence of Bombay Beach led by the souls of those that lived it.

Additional Artists: Adisa Ziric, Dmytro Bershadskyy, Tah Rei, Sofia Gyenes, Priscila Madrigal, Spenser Little, Aaron Willcox, Rob Leifheit, Roberto Gutiérrez Osnaya, Taib, Marc Abouaf, Michaela Hares
Abridged Project Text: An interdimensional portal to the world of ritual coffee, immersive art and global dance electronica.

SYZYGY: a site-specific ritual lab weaving sculpture, anthropology, light & sound installation. We explore grief and ecological intelligence as fluid, transpersonal and transcorporeal processes, invoking ritual and sonic information as ancient technologies for coregulation, (re)connection & healing.
its in the files
Before Judgement, before Confession, one must Sin.

ORACLE BOOTH
      ───────────────

   a living system
   where time unfolds

      stars in motion
      bodies present

   presence
      shifts
      the state

   sound aligns
      between
      time
      and attention

   data becomes form

   chaos / computation
            vision

Project Name: Glorious Holy Kings: Queer Heaven in Bombay Beach
Additional Artists: Dadaonysus, Isaac Taylor, Alex Pahl Skinner
Abridged Project Text: Glorious Holy Kings is a drag show highlighting Kings uniquely designed for Bombay Beach. The Queer community has faced many judgements through the years, and not one of them has stopped us from celebrating our most authentic selves! Kingdom comes in the land of milk, honey, and drag.
Multiple Firework shows & dazzling effects
The world's premier contemporary fine herb fair comes to Bombay (Beach)

A massive pez dispenser Modeled after the late great Deno. A legendary Pez collector and a legendary man. It’s a joyful monument to  sweetness, hobbies, and the small rituals that survive us. Because grief, like candy, is easier to swallow when shared, unwrapped, and a little ridiculous.

Come see Bombay Beach through its first tourist binoculars. Instead of the present, the viewer reveals images of the town’s past and imagined futures, aligned to where you stand and look. A familiar device becomes a site-specific gallery for memory, anxiety, hope, and reflection.
The Butterfly Pavilion is an immersive experience created with colorful origami butterflies and flowers and lights creating a fantasy experience
Step up, lay down , stay the night if it feels right. bring  friends old and new, see what tips the scale in your favor and be judged or judged not

Additional Artists: Paul Glavin, Ben Meissner, Graham Sandelski, Cameron Overy
Abridged Project Text:
Cool… so you think you figured out how to solve all of Imperial County’s problems?

HA.

Snowball's chance in hell.
StarShade is rapidly-deployable self-replicating open-source solar-powered shade structure that converts sunlight into Love.

Residents map the forces shaping Bombay Beach: water politics, toxic dust, lithium extraction, community survival. Large-scale collaborative drawings debut at the Biennale, inviting visitors to add knowledge. The maps become living documents and permanent infrastructure for advocacy and planning.

Death is inevitable, but the true horror is the infinite return. Inspired by Buddhist earthly hells, Algo(g)rave explores possibilities of disrupting the material-time mesh network of life. To escape the cycle, we move through recursive loops toward white noise—the soul’s final, static resolution.

Project Name: The Bombay Beach Country Club, The 6th Hole @Neptune
Abridged Project Text: While clearing debris at a property on ave A, crews unearthed a putting green once belonging to the old Bombay Beach Country Club from its glory days in the 1960s.A restoration and a re-opening celebration is scheduled to coincide with theopening of Neptune,the latest addition to the BB solar system

I participate in the BBB as a giant olive, letting the elements, environment, and other artists change and influence me. Over the course of the weekend, I devise/create a final performance, and perform it at midnight on Sunday.

“Come to Cheesus” in an Old Time Religion styled tent revival as Rev. Earl E. Gaytes preaches about the one true whey of salvation. Expect a cheesy sermon, boxed wine communion, some food & fellowship to follow.

I sought but to seek it vainly, 
that one lost chord divine; 
which came from the soul of the organ, 
and entered into mine. 
It may be that death's bright angel
Will speak in that chord again,
It may be that only in Heaven
I shall hear that grand Amen.

Project Name: Grounded: Loss at the Salton Sea
Abridged Project Text:
"Grounded: Loss at the Salton Sea" is a site-specific art installation at the Bombay Beach Marina that directly addresses the dramatic water loss and environmental decline of the Salton Sea.
The project will feature a boat cut in half widthwise and partially ~ bedded into the dry marina basin, positionea as if wrecked and permanently stranded. 

The work transforms the abandoned marina into a powerful visual statement about disappearance, environmental fragility, and the consequences of water depletion.

Extend the dock that I recently built so that it can remain in the lake for a few more years as the Salton Sea dries up. This is something the community loves. I'd like funding to extend it further out over the water and make some safety enhancements.

This is a post-apocalyptic social simulation. Playground where visitors receive new identities and enter temporary social roles. Through immersive interactions, rituals, and exchanges, participants experiment with identity, explore connection, choice, and survival.

Project Name: Salton Sea Stellar Sky Society: Star Sight Site
Additional Artists: Gregg Fleishman, Jamie Dunphy, Brent Pearson & Sarah Larsen
Abridged Project Text: The Salton Sea Stellar Sky Society’s Star Sight Site: a shared sculptural sanctuary supplying stargazing, star-seeking, skyward study, and speculative celestial storytelling for the Bombay Beach community. Styled and supported by The 9-foot Comeback Cube by Gregg Fleishman.

Additional Artists: Bombay Beach Community, Martians, Biennale Audience
Abridged Project Text: Curated by Tarcila Neves, Ghost Layers is a permanent AR archive bridging Bombay Beach residents, Martian speculative artists, and the audience. Solar beacons reveal local histories through inclusive AR and music by the Bombay Beach Choir, creating a gamified legacy of presence and accessibility.
Time is running.
Bombay Beach is famous for being home to at least 33 of the World’s Tallest Ghosts. Or has it? Claims have been made that our ghosts may be undeserving of the title. We must maintain integrity.

Welcome, wayward soul! Our condolences on your recent death. Judgement is upon you, as it is for us all. What will you take with you into your next life and what will you leave behind? The Reincarnation Station is interactive theater for 1-2 participants at a time that asks this important question.

An outdoor performance combining live music, choreographed dancers, a large LED screen, and light-based interventions. Set within environmental and structural decay, the work explores spiritual persistence and human resilience—not through escape, but through the act of remaining.
Earthy electronic, psychedelic bass, and epic beats.
DJ performance wherever whenever is clever, sub club local slot would be rad.

The Colorado, narrated by the stage legend Marc Rylance, takes us on an epic journey through the prehistoric settlements of the region, the period of European exploration, the dam-building era, modern industrial agriculture and immigration, and the impact of climate change.

A surreal, seriocomic narrative short film about fear, judgement, the lust for death, and queer friendship at the end of the world. A tenacious and ultimately hopeful film debut shot in Bombay Beach under the Buck Moon of 2023, only growing more relevant with each tick of the doomsday clock.

Interactive canvas painting with neon paint that glows in the dark. The canvas features the opening scene of the book L and the Angel Cat, based on a true story about love, life, and spirit.
Come socialize, enjoy great music, and join painting — everyone is welcome!  Includes a children section.

Project Name: “Tilapia Tank”: A Startup Incubator Brought to You by Silicon Wasteland
Abridged Project Text: An evening of improvised shenanigans lampooning the absurdity of startup and investment culture at the end of the world in a place of disinvestment

Sima & Sidu are a DJ duo with a love for mixing South Asian rhythms and melodies into music from around the world! They are all about inspiring people to let loose and just be silly on the dance floor.
Freestyle rap is rhythmic speech you discover in the moment to entertain or express yourself. A beginner friendly workshop focused on connecting to self and others.

Project Name: Pickle That Up presents THE SACRAMENT OF THE HOLY BRINE
Abridged Project Text:
Pickle That Up brings THE SACRAMENT OF THE HOLY BRINE to all creatures great and small in Bombay Beach. 

Witness the miracle of fermentation! 
Visit our Altar of Acidity, receive the sacrament, and become one the faithful dill-sciples.
If the neon pickle is glowing—come and be preserved.

Salton Sea Synth is a browser-based synthesizer powered by real-time air quality sensors in Bombay Beach.

Data from air quality sensors control sound parameters, turning this desert ecology conditions into data-driven music that anyone at the Bi

Mobile Off Grid Studio Suites. Open house. Prepare to be inspired to the possibilities of living the life you have always dreamed of! Travelling full time, adventures, freedom, independence, simplicity, meaningful community and the time & energy to explore and live all of your delicious passions.

I'll present a reading from a larger work of near-future fiction, "Precision". The work is an eschatology of the West. Tension builds as societal collapse feels imminent, but a suspicious calm challenges our assumptions of Western values, and inspire curiosity in imagined alternatives.

A dedicated art space to collect, promote and incubate  the creative practice of local Bombay
Artists..

Project Name: Aerial silks performing arts and workshops
Abridged Project Text: Aerial silks performing arts and workshops. Inspiring creativity, self expression, and fitness through aerial dance.

Additional Artists: Hunter Morley, Eric Massimo, Natalie Wagenka, Napoleon, David Amaya, Pedro Valiente, Greg Glesser, Chloe Moe
Abridged Project Text: When The Sun begins to set and the shadows start to rise, the Titty twister comes alive! Step right up and come inside our house of debauchery , where freaks dance the night to the the beat pulsing through our bodies like the blood pouring into our glasses as we slip into the dawn.

AI is our era's apocalyptic narrative. This talk traces how the eschatological frame operates as both a belief system and a power structure, concentrating authority in those who claim to understand the coming transformation. how can we engage with the change without submitting to this mythology?

Additional Artists: Dmytro Pavlenko, Milena Nechay, Mari Melnichenko, Olesya Zrezartseva, Sofiya Bak,
Abridged Project Text: This is performance with tea ceremony and sound healing. Two rooms:1 is small shop with empty shelves from our USSR childhood. Greeter serves black tea and talks to guests. After he let guests in to main lounge, that hides behind hidden door. There’s geishas, tea ceremon and sound healing

An original hour-long psych pop SKY WHITE TIGER concert featuring original songs, electro/acoustic soundscapes, and layered vocal tapestries, accompanied by movement and whisper wisdom from Sky Psychic Brides. (THE OPERA HOUSE or THE SUB CLUB )

Project Name: THE HEATHEN TEMPLE: SANCTUARY (featuring DIA LUNA)
Additional Artists: Andrea Diaz, Dani Gros, Jonathan Bareford
Abridged Project Text: The angel birds of Bombay Beach are calling you. Are you ready to fly the highest highs and dive the deepest depths of your human experience? Find sanctuary at the HEATHEN TEMPLE with music alchemists DIA LUNA. We welcome your holy wholeness! Shred your sins and sing your prayers!

Project Name: Community Patchwork/Quilting Bee of the Damned
Abridged Project Text: Together we steward cast-aside fibers and create a Biennale tapestry. Sew in community, and merge tattered scraps into something new. Unlike the gods who would condemn and abandon the world they created, we explore the latent potential in each textile.

Project Name: Live painting performances with musicians and DJs on stages. Workshops.
Abridged Project Text: A live painting performance where music, myth, and ancient symbols converge. Gamayuna channels archetypal imagery in real time, transforming sound into vision and the stage into a ritual space. Each work invites the audience into remembrance.
An AR piece that allows you to hear body stories while inhabiting the nude body of the storyteller.

Additional Artists: Brooke Burgstahler, Felis La Fleur, Benja, Euphemia
Abridged Project Text: Judgment has been indefinitely postponed due to tea service. Enter a white-gloved waiting room between Heaven and Hell, where bells summon poems, rituals unfold quietly, and sanctuary replaces spectacle. Rest here before the gavel falls. Let it Steep.

The Tiny House of Soft Displacement imagines a home away from home—a third-culture dream space where delusion & nostalgia coexist. This interactive installation, a playful companion to the Ballad of Boobi Jean short film, invites viewers into an intimate, surreal interior shaped by memory & longing.

Artist Name: M. G. Espar with Frenchie,Mike Espar (aka M. G. Espar)
Abridged Project Text: The Silver Tongued Devil: A Speaker-Creature is an interactive sound sculpture constructed out of broken music equipment collected by a recently-deceased San Diego musician. Visit the Creature to hear angels plummeting into the Underworld—and to receive your own flattering fortune!

Ambient Atlas is a traveling sound project created by Alan Kahler (chimaksou). He brings his 4-string electric bass and a table-top full of loopers, delays, reverbs, and effects to far out lands to explore the nature of time with what he calls, live and improvised site-specific sonic sculptures.

Live music. Interruptions. Clown. 
Joy gets thrown away. The desert listens.

Slop-nine has crystalized. A enneaptych (9-ptych) depicting our world's unstable suspension between genesis and extinction, impression and sensation, belief and reality, heaven and hell. 

I offer fragments of a personal journey collaged as an ever-incomplete altarpiece resisting drowning in slop.

Additional Artists: Producer/Director: Cameron Gregg - Playwright: Douglas Clarke - Co-Producer: Kirby
Abridged Project Text: What would you do if providence found its way into your life after years of struggle. What if the people in your life finally contained traits that matched your ideals. What if one day you discovered that all your dreams were set to come true as you're surrounded by those near and dear to you?
An archival family history and collection of images found in my great grandmothers belongings showcasing life as recent Mexican migrants settled in the Coachella Valley in the 1940's and 50s.

A live musical performance using prepared cassette tape loops of various lengths as source material. Old Walkmans and effect pedal chains build layered, melodic sound in real time. The loops drift in and out of sync as hiss and gentle warble become part of the music.

Project Name: Ashes and Breath: A Rite of Impermanence
Additional Artists: Dimo Zhang, Toria Kahni, Elijah Badua, Ymani, Moodswing, CeShi, Zhao Zhang, Kyle
Abridged Project Text:
Here, judgement is felt, not delivered.
A sonic ritual using throat singing, ethnic instruments, fire dance, sub-bass and electronic interaction. Rooted in the ancient, oriented toward the future, the performance moves through rupture and collapse, exposing the impermanent nature of mind and matter.
Perception bending Psychedelic op art geometric wormhole

As Moore's Law stopped being true in the 2020s and the US is making advanced AI chips again, a semisensualconductor explores a more organic, sensory pie experience of the latest innovations in making atomic sized transistors that power the AI race. What does it mean for a human to eat a transistor?

Last year, I collected microbial samples from the Salton Sea at Bombay Beach. They produce significant electrical signals, like small batteries that vary with sunlight.

This will be a performance where I map these into musical notes with 16 different sample jars and LEDs on each.

Project Name: ‘All In’ at the End of the World
Abridged Project Text: At the edge of the Salton Sea, Frick Frack Blackjack rises from the ruins of Bombay Beach. No cash. No limits. Wager a secret, a relic, a dare. In a town shaped by decay, we gamble with meaning and where risk becomes ritual and luck is whatever you’re brave enough to bet.

After the last judgment has fallen, the table remains. A banquet rises from the dust: luminous and alive. Moss drapes its surface. Golden apples glimmer. The table requests your presence and your participation. The ritual of renewal asks: Who judges? Who redeems? And can we recreate Eden, together?

Grotto Heaven awaits: float amongst lush mountains, wander through the clouds, see salt that sparkles and herbs that whisper. Recline and breathe in this Daoist-inspired pocket paradise—perhaps heaven is closer than we think.

You stumble across a glowing, mysterious mailbox. It beckons you closer—you can’t resist. The moment you open the door, a dazzling kaleidoscope of swirling lights bursts to life. For a breathless instant, you’re no longer here. You’ve slipped into another dimension.

Additional Artists: Melanie Pincus, Noah Barr, Rohit Korrapolu, Massimo Bardetti
Abridged Project Text: A 6-minute blindfolded journey on a magic carpet. EEG captures how your nervous system responds to surrender, rhythm, mystery, being seen — and translates it into four glyphs sealed in wax. Your frequency fingerprint. The quest: find the others on your wavelength.

Project Name: An information-theoretic recapitulation of God in the form of a public figure
Abridged Project Text: a public figure : from the conditions of embodiment -vulnerability, mortality, open, endedness, we get intrinsic Drives to maximize complexity on multiple scales, advocating for an epistemic/homeostatic value in cultivating trust on infinite spacetimehorizons, towards the empowerment of all things.

Project Name: A Piece of Hell's Kitchen: The Family Fridge
Abridged Project Text: The Anti-Bootlicking Coalition has been granted access to display an intimate item belonging to Satan himself— his family's refrigerator! It's on-loan for the weekend, from the folks downstairs. All are invited to take a peek into Satan’s private life through the lens of this everyday appliance.

Additional Artists: Zach Brosi / Eric Sigler / Hunter Avery
Abridged Project Text: SHRiNKRAY breaks conventional norms of typical musical performances by creating dynamic audio visual experiences. We strive to create a collective mind among our audience, sweeping crowds away into complete presence.

The sculpture is Queen Martha, Martha is a mermaid, octopus, with a cow skull head with
horns and a moon crown tentacles beckoning the sea to return to her, the
tentacle coming out of the shore in the distance almost reaching back to her. Finished with a cement/fiberglass mixture

Additional Artists: Spenser Little, Kathia Ruda, Colin Hornett
Abridged Project Text: A look into the power structures in place to control and contain women.

the sculpture SAND CASTLE is designed to be anchored in the water. 
It consists of 3 different layered metal structures that represent the walls of a sand castle.
Size can be determined depending on where it would be installed.
The entire sculpture is painted with fluorescent paint.

Will you...
Answer the Call?

An intimate installation within a small space, centered on a broken mirror: “Mirror, mirror on the wall; you became your mother after all.” As my mother ages, weakens, and the end draws closer, the work confronts role reversal, resentment, and forgiveness—staging a deeply personal Last Judgement.
You know what BB is missing? A full-sized acoustic drum set, permanently rooted on the beach.

When engaging with digital software services in which the consumer is the product, we consent to an exchange of personal data and precious attention for convenience and comfort. Data Dump offers the same transactional proposition, promising a luxury experience exchanged for the most intimate of data

Project Name: WHAT THE BODY OWES THE FIRE
Abridged Project Text: An ornate chapel houses Saint Kümmernis, her body sealed in cascading wax. Attendants exchange hair or blood for a candle, which must be burned immediately. Death-altar audio fills the space. Judgment occurs without gods. Time is offered. Fire collects.

A REVELATION TO MOST THAT THE RECEDING SHORELINE OF THE SALTON SEA ISNT A SLOW ONE BUT ONE THAT IS HAPPENING FAST AND IF NOTHING HAPPENS TO ADDRESS AND FIX THE ISSUES WE ARE ALL SCREWED AND WE LOSE THE ONE MAGICAL THING THAT BRINGS US ALL TOGETHER

Project Name: LUNA Raccoon Guardian: A Living Monument to Memory
Abridged Project Text: LUNA is a glowing raccoon robot that roams Bombay Beach to listen. She is a witness, not a performer. Powered by local AI, she remembers every story shared with her. LUNA remains after the festival as permanent infrastructure—a living monument that grows smarter and deeper with every conversation.

You can never tell who the saints and sinners walking amongst us are. I do not aim to make it obvious with my wandering art. Maybe more to show it will actually never be clear. Inner demons and deities are a part of us all.

Additional Artists: Sarina Moretti, Artists TBA depending on grant budget
Abridged Project Text:
Darling, 

The Madam requests your presence to play in the ephemeral delights of our shared devotion to life itself. Enter, The Poetry Brothel, a realm of intimate encounters where you just may catch a startling glimpse of your true nature.

In Endless Adoration,
The Madam

Light up metal stripper pole.
Fuck Yeah!

Additional Artists: Primordial Furniture: Tyler Dean Larson, Oscar Sharp, Ken Huffman
Abridged Project Text: A charred concrete monolith rises from Salton’s shore – an exponential staircase piercing the horizon. As each step doubles in height, their populations – toys from the stages of history and childhood – shrink in stature and surge in number.  Above them waits a rocket. A digital clock counts down.

This is a monumental musical instrument.  The design is iconic and will last through time. Its configuration appears light and delicate.    The design is to be physically interacted with to make it ring.  Yet visually it’s amazing in its own form.

Additional Artists: people in town and two martians shant and lyosha said they will help and Kevin said DO IT!
Abridged Project Text: Come paddle out from the regenerative kayak boat bay by the cahuilla sea. Made of recycled sustainable materials. Accessible near the Bombay Beach dock. Built for all who seek to enjoy sitting on the sea in peace.

Anthropogenesis is a surreal sculpture containing a dendrochronological record of anthropogenic transformation of the Salton Sea. The installation symbolizes the inception of transgression and our subsequent expulsion from paradise.

A 6.5-foot freestanding mosaic mirror installation that fractures and reassembles the viewer’s reflection. Set against the desert landscape, The Last Judge transforms the idea of judgment into an intimate confrontation with the self — unstable, multiplied, and quietly revealing.
Educational Posters written in alien script.

Porous subliminally injects earworms with “morally correct” lyrics into the participants of BBB. Subtly perverted everyday objects will be distributed across the city. When the sound around it is loud enough, each device plays a song just below perception. We’ll all be singing the same unknown song.

LooK is a large-scale steel installation addressing cyclist safety and shared road awareness.  A white bicycle forms the double “o,” chained to a telephone pole in the visual language of Ghost Bikes.  Flowers transform it into a living memorial urging drivers and cyclists alike to truly look.

The Human Cactus Memorial is an 8' human-scale saguaro formed from interwoven bicycle locks, arms raised in surrender and hope. Created for the Bombay Beach Biennale, it honors my son and embodies endurance in harsh landscapes. Native plantings transform it into a living, growing desert memorial.

The Self-Attunement Structures (SAS) is a seven-part ritual disguised as play: a journey through the body as home. Drawing from somatics, yoga, performance, and myth. A DIY self-encounter. Part playground, part confessional. Where participants feel first, think later, and become their own witness.

An angelic archway rises from the Salton Sea, thickened into wing-like forms and encrusted in barnacles. Walk beneath a gate grown from fallen life, where the accidental descent of sealife mirrors angels’ fall.

Additional Artists: Velvate Brale, Snow Leopard, Gold Museum, DJ Cypod, VJ Colours
Abridged Project Text: The X-Zoetrope is a PVC H-Rotor turbine merging kinetic engineering with early animation. Driven by wind or guests, its slats create a shutter effect, while Pi-controlled LEDs provide stroboscopic light. This hybrid transforms the "X" theme into a glowing, desert-activated communal ritual.

I’m building a cross out of railroad ties and will do a live art show around it involving paint. Later, I would like to install it somewhere, possibly on the beach. Inspired in part by my Catholic upbringing, the state of the world, and my professional and artistic goals.

R1elic asks whether the single family home and the associated R1 zoning apparatus that supports it is either 1) an object of sacred reverence, 2) an artifact that can now be appreciated from a distance, or 3) something we need to abolish entirely to achieve urban absolution?

A silent migration appears beside the Salton Sea: extinct animals breathing dim light beneath torn translucent skins. The desert hums with a distant tremor as a ghostly path unfolds — and those who follow begin to recognize their place within the same procession.

A star tetrahedron beacon and central platform rises as a center point, anchoring a 12-point Grid installation. Each point has symbolic correspondences described on plaque and in construction. Swiveling meditation seats at each point allow visitors to meditate and participate with central beacon.

Project Name: Life in the Balance - the Scales of Justice
Abridged Project Text: The Anubis scales of Justice. I feel this biennale needs a call for accountability and justice in a world robbed of it. Lets weigh our human heart against a feather to see if we justify entry to the underworld. Our life hangs in the balance.

A spatial AR experience overlaying the architecture of a psychiatric ward onto Bombay Beach. Using the story of a "schizophrenic poet," visitors navigate a landscape where desert ruins meet clinical memories. It is a walk through the boundaries of confinement, perception, and poetic liberation.
We sometimes get lost in our own echos, narrowing our perspective of the wide world around us.

The Final Weighing preserves a stranded shoreline of driftwood, barnacles, and debris in illuminated resin arches facing the Salton Sea sunset. Installed as a temporary desert chapel, it confronts viewers with what remains after retreat — a reckoning not of souls, but of matter left behind.
Creating meditative moments of connection to self and others through paint, bright colors, and patterns that feel like a hug for your brain.

Project Name: About To Pop Off In Ways You Can’t Even Imagine
Additional Artists: MACEPs (Mz Aqua's Community Enrichment Projects team)
Abridged Project Text: We’re gearing up for year 2 at the POP lot. We plan to have a variety of art installations, live performances, talks, workshops, etc. We are seeking funding to help facilitate transportation and some small miscellaneous costs.
Transformation story of a Bombay Beach Beater GLOW UP into a vibey Biennale spot raising funds for showing artists.

Project Name: THE FOUR HORSES OF THE APOCALYPSE
Abridged Project Text: I’m going to build 4 horsefly traps (each the size of a small horse), and place them at roughly 4 equidistant points at the outskirts of town (e.g. on property near the corners). These will be functional art pieces, with the top half designed to attract and kill horseflies, and CNC-cut horse legs.

Project Name: Bad Urchin’s Speakeasy Hideout - Geodetic Dome Project
Abridged Project Text: Aye! Avast! You have found Bad Urchin’s Geodesic Hideout. Climb up into the crows nest and take a load off, or sit in our shade and talk story. If luck finds you around sunset the roaming speakeasy may show, and if it does you could find yourself with ice cream or mocktail in hand shortly. Aloha!

Additional Artists: Deedee Anderson, Bobby Bergin, Aubrielle Hvolboll, Siena Jeakle, Matthew Sater, Mori Wexler
Abridged Project Text: Freak Nature’s giant puppet immersive theater have time again narrowly avoided achieving world peace. Enter Out of Body Expo, a world of DIY puppetry and reality-bending experimentation. Buckle up and lock in 4 a live-scored performexperience that lies just beyond what our flesh brains can imagine.

Project Name: We Shall Have the Eyes to See
Abridged Project Text: Inside the Poetry House, we gather to listen to a song, write and imagine a different Last Judgement. Community-written poetic fragments are transformed into large textile flags - colored, print and hand-embroidered - declaring the possibility of hope and renewal.
We bring vibrant dance music, tacos, and other specialty foods together. Our vision is a dance floor filled with celebration, community, and the love of tacos and techno.
